entry.title: Re: Pricing procedure determination for Free of Charge pr...
entry.content: Hi. Thanks for the answer. My question was connected specifically to S4H Public Cloud and CBC. There is an option to define a new pricing procedure, but I can't assign it to the order type CBFD. I know how to do it in on-prem S4H in the IMG menu, but I can't do it in S4H Public Cloud, in CBC.

entry.title: Re: SAP Fiori for SAP S/4HANA – Fiori My Inbox – Part 1 Activation
entry.content:
Hi 

If i need tasks from different backends (CRM , ECC) into my inbox,i maintaining system aliases(CRM,ECC)  under taskprocessing is ecnough?

 

Thanks

Shankar

entry.title: Re: How to get all logs or list of all events triggered t...
entry.content:
With https://github.com/kyma-project/serverless/releases/tag/1.4.3 we have patched the problematic configuration of secrets, unfortunately the warning event will stop be emitted by kubernetes after function pod restart. You can restart all the function pods in a given namespace by running

kubectl rollout restart deployment -l serverless.kyma-project.io/managed-by=function-controller -n {namespace}

Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: SAC how to get performance form rating data from succ...
entry.content:
Hello Team,

To fetch any data from SF to SAC we have to first create a connection. For that you can follow this below KBA-

2339542 - How to connect to SAP SuccessFactors from SAP Analytics Cloud.

https://userapps.support.sap.com/sap/support/knowledge/en/2628523

entry.title: Re: Delay Learning Assignments
entry.content:
Hi Santiago

At present this particular functionality is currently not available. However there is an enhancement request created for this issue which has the status of For Long-term Consideration

Please feel free to add you comment. Also a similar enhancement has been Acknowledged by Product Management but again no time line on when this may be available.

If this information helped you then please consider giving Kudos or accepting this post as solution.

Thanks

Padraig

entry.title: Re: April (Citizen) Developer Challenge – SAP Build Apps: Task 4 - Mobile device capabilities
entry.content: @anumalasingh Had similar last week using a business e-mail address and had to raise a support ticket with foursquare but they can take a day to fix. Alternatively, try using a gmail account.

entry.title: Re: visual code studio command run failed with error : sp...
entry.content:
Hello,

I am happy to announce that the fix is now released. The fix is contained in "@sap/ux-ui5-tooling" package, version 1.13.3. In order to obtain the fix, please do the following:

  1. In VSCode open the command palette
  2. Search and execute the command "Fiori: Open Application Info"
  3. After the Application Info Page is opened, click on the link for updating "@sap/ux-ui5-tooling"

Best regards,

Zdravko

entry.title: Re: visual code studio command run failed with error : sp...
entry.content: Hi, this issue is now fixed. Please check my answer above.

Is it possible to mass upload or mass management for access control owners ?

Please share comments,

Best Regards,

entry.title: New runtime (4.9.259) issue
entry.content:
Hi there!

I am facing this problem with all builds done with the new Client runtime version 4.9.259: my app gets frozen on the login page.

This is what is reported by the Google Play Console:

java.lang.RuntimeException: Unable to start activity ComponentInfo{xxx.com/xxx.com.MainActivity}: androidx.fragment.app.Fragment$InstantiationException: Unable to instantiate fragment com.swmansion.rnscreens.ScreenFragment: calling Fragment constructor caused an exception

 

Has the same thing happened to anyone?

entry.title: Re: Linking into several variants from diagrams in Signav...
entry.content:
Hello Anna,

I understand your point and concern.  Process variants and templates are distinct process models within the repository. Assisting users in navigating this repository can be approached through various methods, such as employing navigation maps or establishing links between process models and variants. Another potential approach could involve implementing a diagram landing page tailored to the plants or locations of users within the HUB, ensuring that they encounter relevant diagrams upon accessing Signavio. For the most effective strategy implementation, it's advisable to seek guidance from our professional services team, who can advise on the current range of possibilities and best practices. You can address this request to the following email: signavio_success@sap.com

Best,

entry.title: Re: Welcome to the SAP Enterprise Architecture Community Group!
entry.content:
Happy to be part of this group.

Thanks and Regards,

Kirti Singh

entry.title: Change payment terms and payment method vendor invoice
entry.content:
Dear All,

when we post a supplier invoice and we change the payment terms, the payment method does not change automatically even if in customizing are linked. Is it a SAP standard behaviour?

Thanks and Kind Regards.

Gloria

entry.title: ABAP2XLSX change comment size
entry.content:
Hello.

I'm using ABAP2XLSX to create some excel files.

I need to add comments in some cells.
I've seen the example ZDEMO_EXCEL_COMMENTS and I've managed to create comments in my file.

The problem is that the size of the comment is too small. And I cannot see any option in the method add_comment to change the size.

So I'm trying to change the size of all the comments added by code (by the moment).
In class ZCL_EXCEL_WRITER_2007 and method CREATE_XL_DRAWING_FOR_COMMENTS I've seen a line to create the shape of the comment and the following line:


lc_xml_attr_style       value = 'size:auto;width:auto;height:auto;position:absolute;margin-left:117pt;margin-top:172.5pt;z-index:1;visibility:hidden' ),

I'm trying to change the width and height and some other values in this line, buy nothing happens.

I've tried removing "size:auto"
and put "width:900pt;height:40pt "

Any tip?

Thanks

entry.title: Re: Pricing procedure determination for Free of Charge pr...
entry.content: In your reply 'A' represents document pricing procedure. It is standard document pricing procedure. Free of charge documents usually have another one. I can find it in CBC in the app ID 101118 (Set pricing precedure determination).

entry.title: Re: CPM Feedback request card. Mobile enabled?
entry.content: Looking at this again. It does note in the guide that it is not mobile enabled.

entry.title: Incorrect stock in MD04
entry.content:
Hi,

After S/4 implementation MD04 stock are incorrect. We have 5 stock provided to vendor and 5 stock in unrestricted.

But MD04 is displaying stock as 10. MD04 should show only unrestricted stock.

I am using MRP area type 01.

We don't want to use subcontract MRP type.

entry.title: BAPI_MATERIAL_SAVEREPLICA Extension
entry.content:
Hello All,

I have a requirement to update custom fields in the material master through the custom program. I am trying to use BAPI_MATERIAL_SAVEREPLICA BAPI by passing extension parameters. The Return parameter is giving success message but the data is not updating. Its gives me like No changes made message.

Anyone faced this issue and have any solution for this ? Please let me know. Thanks in advance.

entry.title: Re: Welcome all SAP Community members, start here!
entry.content: Hi, I am Gaayathri from Bangalore. Happy to be part of this community.

entry.title: Re: Digital Skills Initiative Applicant Guide (For self-study candidates)
entry.content:
Dear David,

I am Lesia Bilohan, and I would like to express my keen interest in securing a free certification attempt under your esteemed initiative. I am greatly inspired by your commitment to empowering underrepresented groups in the technology field.

Originally from Ukraine, I left it in 2022 I am now building my life and restart my professional journey in the Netherlands. My professional background spans B2B sales and business development in the IT and fintech sectors. After taking a career break I am currently reskilling and upskilling myself to be able to make a pivot in my professional journey and become a technology professional with focus on data analytics. My role has involved strategic planning, customer relationship management, and leading market expansion efforts on an international scale. These experiences have sharpened my analytical abilities and deepened my understanding of business and operational risks, sparking my interest in SAP’s ERP systems.

Motivated to immerse myself in the SAP ecosystem, I am eager to contribute to its vibrant and diverse community. I recognize the critical importance of certifications in the tech industry as they not only validate expertise but also open doors to new professional opportunities and advancements.

 This opportunity would be invaluable for both my personal growth and professional development, and it would mark a significant step toward overcoming barriers and promoting diversity within the industry.

I am excited about the possibility of joining the SAP community and leveraging my diverse skill set for positive contributions. Committed to continuous learning, I am enthusiastic about participating in projects that meld technology with strategic business solutions.

Thank you for considering my application. 

Warm regards,

Lesia Bilohan

entry.title: Re: Welcome all SAP Community members, start here!
entry.content:
Welcome @KirtiSingh01 and @Gaayathri - be sure to check out our location groups!

@Gaayathri - you might like to join the Bengaluru group, if you haven't done so already.

entry.title: Managed Systems Setup Check for On-Premise ABAP systems connected to SAP Cloud ALM
entry.content:
The ABAP system Managed Systems Setup Check now available for customers.
This is a tool you can use to troubleshoot problems with Managed ABAP systems connected to SAP Cloud ALM

It is included in ST-PI 740 SP26, and for lower supported ST-PI versions via SAP Notes 3426408 - Cloud ALM: Connection Setup Checks for Deployment Management and 3432845 - SAP Cloud ALM - CDM: Create DDIC objects needed for note 3426408

We want to encourage customers to use this tool 

It has been implemented via transaction /n/sdf/alm_diagnostic, or via report /SDF/CALM_CDM_CONN_DIAGNOSTIC and should be used as the first step when having issues with the Managed ABAP system.

As you can see there are various checks and the solutions can be found in the Solutions for Errors in the Managed System Setup Check here

Here is an example run in one of SAP's Test ERP 6.0 Test Systems where it has found an issue and the link to the solution was used to navigate to it in Help SAP

Again this is a tool customers can use to help diagnose issues  on the managed ABAP system and enable customers to resolve many of them on their own using the tool and the embedded links to SAP Help to find the solution based on the check status warning/error.

entry.title: Re: Incorrect stock in MD04
entry.content:
Hi,

Please see here

https://community.sap.com/t5/enterprise-resource-planning-q-a/stock-with-vendor/qaq-p/12082517

Regards

entry.title: Re: SAP S/4HANA Cloud and On-Premise Deployment Options
entry.content:
Hello Amin & members,

Very good insight.
I particularly wanted to know whether having the HANA database on premise and application servers on the cloud is an option (in line with GDPR and other compliance requirements).
Is there any such offering/option from SAP?

Also, is there any latest (2024) documentation/video from SAP with respect to the different cloud options?

Suraj

entry.title: Re: I created a table function, but in amdp I am not able to create table using sqlscript to append
entry.content: As I know, in AMDP you cannot create tables dynamically like you do in SQL. Did you check, if you can use table variables to store and manipulate data?

entry.title: Re: SAP Hana Calculation view input parameter from JPA Entity
entry.content: Did you check, if you can pass the input parameter to the calculation view by using the `setParameter` method of the `Query` object in JPA?

https://community.sap.com/t5/enterprise-resource-planning-q-a/data-table-duplicate-unique-id-66000-137/qaq-p/3419321

Kind Regards
Nidhi Singh
SAP Business One Support

entry.title: Re: Migration Cockpit Error (Condition record for pricing in sales)
entry.content: The error message indicates that the value you are trying to migrate has too many decimal places. The system can only handle a maximum of 3 decimal places, but the value you are trying to migrate has 13 decimal places (3479.9999999999995). To solve this problem, you may need to adjust the value to have a maximum of 3 decimal places. Did you try to do rounding the value to the nearest three decimal places?

entry.title: LDAP Role is removed automatically from User Account
entry.content:
Hi Folks,

We have External LDAP server as UME in our SAP Enterprise Portal 7.5 SP25.

Recently we are facing one issue where LDAP roles are automatically getting removed from user account and due to users are not able to see the Portal role as portal roles are linked with LDAP.

 

We have to manually assing the LDAP Role and then user is able to work.

Please let me know how we can solve this issue as there is no logs getting in the nwa.

 

Regards,

Rohit Gera

entry.title: Sales cloud version 2 - App - Offline Functionality
entry.content:
In Sales Cloud Version 1, there was an Offline Mode within the App.

Now in the New App for Sales Cloud Version 2, there seems to be no 'Offline' functionality.

Is the same offline functionality planned as part of the feature parity?

Up until now we only got the information that it is not clear if this will come or maybe be just sold for an extra Retail/App license.  So does that mean, the standard App for Version 2 is not having an offline mode anymore?

A lot of customers are still requesting this.

entry.title: Re: Error while building XSA JS module
entry.content: This error is usually caused by a mismatch between the version of a package you're trying to install and the versions available in the npm registry. In this case, it seems like npm can't find the version 7.3.8 of the semver package. You can check the version of semver in the npm registry, which will list all the versions of semver available in the npm registry. If 7.3.8 is not in the list, you'll possibly need to install a different version.

entry.title: Re: April (Citizen) Developer Challenge – SAP Build Apps: Task 4 - Mobile device capabilities
entry.content:
4525a31fbb4024c83ffe33fc73121d804138d41449741c4955135d0e1a7777f1

I hope this one is correct!

entry.title: Re: Browser in SLD in External mapping tab option for sel...
entry.content:
Hi hk-123

Please check below points:

1.           Please check attached SAP Note 3228614 - Changes to Internal and External Network Settings

This is new feature for SAP Business One 10.0 FP 2208 and higher versions, make sure that the address is accessible to both internal and external networks. You can add a record in the DNS to make the address accessible for the internal networks.

After finishing mapping the addresses for all required components, you must restart the services on the machines on which they're installed.

https://52.232.199.196:40020

https://52.232.199.196:40000

 

2.           Check SAP Business One admin guide https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_BUSINESS_ONE_ADMIN_GUIDE_HANA/1a2fc202f7f64336abf9fbc957d9b9ba/6091ef3f19494629916744024ffe428c.html?q=external&locale=en-US

 section Choosing a Method to Handle External Requests

As the Browser Access service, integration framework, mobile service, analytics service, and Web client enables you to access SAP Business One from external networks, it is essential that external requests can be sent properly to internal services.

 

To handle external requests, we recommend deploying a reverse proxy rather than using NAT/PAT (Network Address Translation/Port Address Translation). Compared with NAT/PTA, the reverse proxy is more flexible and can filter incoming requests.

 

Kind Regards
Nidhi Singh
SAP Business One Support

entry.title: Spotlight on SIT Kol2024 Sponsors:Westernacher Consulting, Galileo Group, SAP Press and Linc limited
entry.content:
As the SAP Inside Track (SIT) event gears up to enlighten and engage SAP enthusiasts in Kolkata, the support and sponsorship from leading industry players are instrumental in making this event a grand success. Among the prominent sponsors for SIT Kolkata 2024 are Westernacher Consulting, Galileo Group, SAP Press and Linc Limited, each bringing unique value and expertise to the table.

Westernacher Consulting India Pvt Limited:

Westernacher is another esteemed sponsor of SIT Kolkata 2024, known for its expertise in digital transformation and supply chain optimization. With a focus on SAP solutions, Westernacher brings valuable insights into enhancing business processes and improving operational efficiency. Their sponsorship adds significant value to the event, offering attendees the opportunity to learn from experts in SAP implementation and business transformation.
 
Galileo Group:
Galileo Group stands out as a key sponsor for SIT Kolkata 2024, offering cutting-edge SAP Cloud ALM solutions. Their Conigma™ Connect Express Integration simplifies the integration of SAP Cloud ALM tools, enabling a seamless and self-service experience without the need for extensive consulting projects. With Galileo Group's sponsorship, attendees can expect to gain insights into how SAP Cloud ALM can revolutionize their ALM strategies and enhance their SAP landscapes.
 
SAP Press:
SAP Press, a renowned publisher of SAP-related books and learning materials, is also sponsoring SIT Kolkata 2024. Their sponsorship underscores the importance of continuous learning and professional development in the SAP ecosystem. Attendees can benefit from SAP Press's sponsorship by accessing valuable resources that enhance their knowledge and skills in SAP technologies.

 

 
Linc Limited:
Linc, a sponsor of the event, is providing the goodies for SIT Kolkata 2024. As a leading provider of promotional products and merchandise, Link's sponsorship adds a fun and engaging element to the event. Attendees can look forward to receiving high-quality goodies that reflect the spirit of innovation and collaboration that defines the SAP community.

In conclusion, the sponsors of SIT Kolkata 2024 play a crucial role in enriching the event experience for attendees. Their support not only adds value to the event but also highlights their commitment to driving innovation and excellence in the SAP community. As attendees immerse themselves in the knowledge-sharing and networking opportunities at SIT Kolkata 2024, they can thank the sponsors for their invaluable contributions.

@DataTherapist 
@malteklassen 
@PankajLal 
SAP Cloud ALM 
EWM - Delivery Processing 
SAP Transportation Management

entry.title: Re: SAP BUSINESS ONE DI API crashes Application
entry.content:
Hi Johan

Thank you for your (maybe) possible solution. Unfortunatly it is a bit tricky to use your .NET solution within VBA. But I will try to build a DLL and use that for ReleaseComObject, when I find some time. Are you thinking about a problem with Garbage Collection?

I had the possibility to try it on a FP2208 HF2 Release and there it worked without any problem. So it seems, that this is a problem within at least the current Release FP2402 HF1.

I also forgot to mention, that the sequence of disconnecting and setting to nothing does matter. If you do both in reversed order, then it does work. In older versions this did not matter...

Best Regards,

Klaus

entry.title: Re: Getting error while configuring SAP system in VSCode
entry.content: Hello Matthias, i have already explore the blog which you sent, unfortunately it won't work for me. please suggest another solution. Thank you

entry.title: Re: The 2024 Developer Insights Survey: The Report
Hybrid Scenario: Usage of SAP HANA Calculation View on SAP Datasphere
entry.content:
Overview

Many users have implemented many HANA Calculation Views on top of SAP BW/4HANA and may asking, how they can use these HANA Calculation Views on SAP Datasphere.

This article describes how you can use HANA Calculation View to access data from SAP Datasphere (BW-Bridge space or Datasphere native space via Datasphere View).

How to get this working we need to bring our BW objects into BW Bridge. As soon as BW objects are brought to BW Bridge, we will find BW objects as Remote Tables in BW Bridge space in SAP Datasphere. Instead of using BW objects via BW Bridge you can also use ABAP or HANA tables directly via system connection.

After that we need to share this Remote Tables to SAP Datasphere native space. In this space we have to create Datasphere View based on these shared Remote Tables.

Via user-provided-service HDI Container we can see the SAP Datasphere Views and we have directly access the data. Via HDI-shared Container, in which HANA Calculation Views will be deployed, we have an access to Datasphere Views in user-provided-service HDI Container. Therefore we can create HANA Calculation Views and use Synonymes (pointed to Datasphere Views in user-provided-service HDI Container) as datasources.

 

1. Create BTP Dev Space

2. Create a new Database Project from template

3. Create a new HDI service instance (HDI-shared)

4. Connect to Cloud Foundry

5. Bind user provided service

6. Build and deploy project

7. Share your BW Bridge in BW Bridge Space to native Datasphere space

8. Create Datasphere View with shared BW Bridge object as data source

9. Create Remote Table in native Datasphere Space

10. Grant access to SAP Datasphere objects

11. Create Synonymes to have an access to Datasphere objects

12. Build and deploy project

13. Create a new HANA Calculation View with Synonymes as data source

Precondition

User-provided service and its relevant database user are created on the SAP Datasphere target space (not BW Bridge space)

To be migrated BW objects are already in BW Bridge or the needed HANA database connection for direct access via Tables is implemented to SAP Datasphere space (in which user-provided service is enabled).

Implementation

1. Create BTP Dev space

Create application in BTP Dev space

Start Business Application Studio with clicking on the Dev space

2. Create a New Business Application Project

Choose SAP HANA Database Project

Enter SAP HANA Database Project Name

Enter module name = db

Choose Database Version and bind database module to run-time service instance

3. Create a new HDI service instance 

Note!
If the service instance name (hdi-shared) has not been created than please make entry as shown on the left side. The service instance name will be created in Cloud Foundry and you can find it with command: cf8 services.

4. Login to Cloud Foundry (if you are still not logged in to Cloud Foundry) 

Use Command Palette to open the login

Note!
Normally you do not need to use Command Palette, since you will be asked to login to Cloud Foundry, if you are not connected

Enter Endpoint and open new browser to generate SSO passcode (if you are still not logged in to Cloud Foundry)

Generate SSO passcode (if you are still not logged in to Cloud Foundry)

Paste the SSO passcode and login (if you are still not logged in to Cloud Foundry)

Select organization and space

5. Bind user provided service

Add database connection for the UPS (User Provided Service)

Note!
The user-provided service instance name can be found in Cloud Foundry with command: cf8 services.

Check MTA.YAML file (DO NOT MODIFY)

After connecting with the user-provided service instance, the YAML file is automatically modified as follow:

Note!
Please do not make any modification in MTA.YAML file. The file will be modified during adjustment in Database connection (see above)

Bind the user-provided service

Note!
After bind icon is klicked the pop up will show as seen below and choose the user-provided service (in this case „Datasphere_XXXXXXXXX“)

6. Build and deploy project

Note!
The database objects will be builded and deployed in the hdi-shared service

Open Database Explorer to see deployed objects

Check project structure

Note!
File structure should looks like on the left side and still empty.

7. Share BW Bridge objects to native Datasphere Space

Share BW Bridge objects to native Datasphere Space

Note!
The objects have to be migrated first into BW Bridge

Share BW Bridge objects to native Datasphere Space

Open Data Builder in native Datasphere Space

8. Create Graphical View in native Datasphere Space

Deploy Graphical View

Note!
By using Graphical View the object is visible in user-provided service (HDI Container: Datasphere_XXXXXX)

9. Create Remote Table in native Datasphere Space

Choose connection

Filter and select table / view

10. Grant access to SAP Datasphere objects

11. Create Synonymes to have an access to Datasphere objects

Note!
The access on Datasphere objects is feaseble through synonyme

Create default access role

12. Build and deploy the project

13. Create a new HANA Calculation View with Synonymes as data source

Add Data Source

Choose Synonym as Data Source

Open details panel of projection

Fields mapping

Connect Projection node to Aggregation node

Expand details panel of Aggregation node

Fields mapping of Aggregation node

 

Build and deploy Calculation View

Data Preview

Summary

As mentioned above we are now able to access SAP Datasphere data via SAP HANA Calculation View. We can also use our existing on Premise HANA Calculation View (XS Classic or XS Advanced) on top of SAP Datasphere by importing it in Business Application Studio, but datasource and field replacements need to be made, since the datasource name as well as fieldnames could be differs. 

@Adam Kosak & @Gabriel Aras: thanks for your support.

Please let me know, if you have any questions.

Thank you

entry.title: Re: Integration Suite Instance Deleted from Trial althoug...
entry.content: Same issue here.

entry.title: SAP CAP - Access Request Body in error handler for 400 - Bad Request error
entry.content:
Hi experts,

in a classic SAP CAP application, Node.js flavour, i have defined a service.js implementation for my service.cds , with a generic error handler:

service.js

const cds = require('@sap/cds'); 

module.exports = async function () {
  /**
  * The generic error handler
  */
  this.on('error', (err, req) => {
    //How to retrieve req.data?
    console.log('Oh no! ' + err.message);
  });
};

 

Let's say that I execute a POST to an entity that throws a DeserializationError. The error is being catched by the error handler but the req.data is undefined.

Is there a way in this scenario to access to the body of the request which caused the error?

entry.title: Re: CONVT_NO_NUMBER when looping over internal table
entry.content: The shortdump shows the 50005215_5025 as the value that can't be converted. I have however used a different solution since than. I changed my internal table to use the STRUC structure but added some extra fields and used these to get the effect I wanted to achieve.

entry.title: Re: reCAP, UI5con, ABAPconf 2024 - Community Run
entry.content: I did not know about global running day. What a funny coincidence! 😄

entry.title: Re: CONVT_NO_NUMBER when looping over internal table
entry.content: Yes they are, but as I said in my reply to Raymond I've found another way to get the end result I wanted.

entry.title: Re: how to transport translation from dev to quality?
entry.content: Did you already look at transaction SLXT (SE63)

entry.title: How is HU VAT 2024 XML is available in S/4 On prem?
entry.content:
A company in big roll-out project would like to go to HU XML reporting. 
Actually the Note 3423555 - HU - VAT Return: new form 2465 on SAP S/4HANA Document and Reporting Compliance is downloaded. The classic report (RFUMSV00) DOES NOT shows the XML for 2024 as a possible DMEE form.

The client would NOT use Fiori.

What is the solution?

entry.title: Re: reCAP, UI5con, ABAPconf 2024 - Community Run
entry.content:
Ha, that is a coincidence 😀 I will share some links with you from last year! 
Maybe some other locations will run in spirit with you guys in their city on the same day!!
Please share some photos with us from your run.

https://community.sap.com/t5/coffee-corner-discussions/global-running-day-with-sap-community/m-p/260623

https://community.sap.com/t5/melbourne-blog-posts/global-running-day-with-sap-community-in-melbourne-wednesday-7th-june-2023/ba-p/13566884

entry.title: how to change the equipment structure
Re: Purchase Requisition - BADI - PROCESS_ITEM - change other items as well
entry.content:
Suggestions

  • Add a call of get_datax / set_datax
  • Prevent infinite loop, only call set_data[x] when actually changing a value

Regards,

entry.title: Re: How to assign Batch for GR materials( 101 mvt type) w...
entry.content:
Hello 

BAPI_PRODORDCONF_GET_TT_PROP is only a proposal. You can change this proposal according to your needs, and then use it to post the actual confirmation.

Regards,
Caetano

entry.title: Re: Upload Excel using SAP RAP Only
entry.content:
Hi @pokrakam 

Thanks for taking interest and reading the blog.

This is a POC where I demonstrated how to read a file (in this case a .CSV file), while I mentioned at last that - "You can try changing the logic to process XSLX file as well.".

If you are unaware of XCO library, let me help you with the code you might be looking for processing a XLX or XLSX file.

*The type definition resembling the structure of the rows in the worksheet selection.
    TYPES: BEGIN OF ty_excel,
             entrysheet TYPE string, "lblni,
             ebeln      TYPE string, "ebeln,
             ebelp      TYPE string, "ebelp,
             ext_number TYPE string, "lblne1,
             begdate    TYPE string, "lzvon,
             enddate    TYPE string, "lzbis,
             quantity   TYPE string, "mengev,
             fin_entry  TYPE string, "final,
           END OF ty_excel,
           tt_row TYPE STANDARD TABLE OF ty_excel.
 
    DATA lt_rows TYPE tt_row.
 
    DATA(lo_xlsx) = xco_cp_xlsx=>document->for_file_content( iv_file_content = lv_attachment )->read_access( ).
    DATA(lo_worksheet) = lo_xlsx->get_workbook( )->worksheet->at_position( 1 ).
 
    DATA(lo_selection_pattern) = xco_cp_xlsx_selection=>pattern_builder->simple_from_to( )->get_pattern( ).
 
    data(lo_execute) = lo_worksheet->select( lo_selection_pattern
      )->row_stream(
      )->operation->write_to( REF #( lt_rows ) ).
 
     lo_execute->set_value_transformation( xco_cp_xlsx_read_access=>value_transformation->string_value
                )->if_xco_xlsx_ra_operation~execute( ).

 Finally, we have the Excel Data in LT_ROWS.

Thanks,
Amit

entry.title: Re: Integration object creation with one to one relation...
entry.content: Thank you Slava for the reply. I have found that issue was with another attribute at product level which was set as unique, setting that false has resolved the issue.

entry.title: 4E9 Scope item-Error NR/751 in Manage Project Billing App
entry.content: Hi experts! We are trying to prepare billing wit app "Manage project billing" and havin an error NR/751, which has no explanation. Can you help us to overcome this mistake?

entry.title: Re: HTML5 exceed the service plan limit
entry.content:
A suggestion here is to use ignore parameters;

https://github.com/SAP-samples/fiori-tools-samples/blob/main/cap/cap-fiori-mta/mta.yaml#L19

Also ensure you are not pulling in any third party resouces, instead, use CDN links.

Change the .mtar to .zip, expand out the contents and see what is being bundled up and deployed.

entry.title: Cannot find logon data from successfactors on sac
entry.content:
Hi Gurus,

My client wants me to create a dashboard on SAC that allows them monitor Successfactors user login frequency to drive adoption.

I have tested and created the report on SF using logon data domain. However, i cannot find logon data on the list of datasets made available via SF - SAC data connection. 

I specifically checked in the PLT-User Management folder but non of the datasets there give the informaiton that Userlogon data in SF represents 

I also checked the other folders in the data exposed on the SF-SAC connection but could not find anyone that gives logon data

Can anyone help please?

entry.title: Re: Newest hdbcli version (2.18.22) leads to failed conne...
entry.content: Please check the instance that you are trying to connect to If the instance has configuration to allow to connect to the IP addresses. That resolved my issue atleast same error.

entry.title: Re: Preparing for Universal Parallel Accounting
entry.content:
Hi Dick,

Great insight. I am also working in UPA with German Phama company.  We recently moved from 2022 to 2023 (OP) version . Do you have some details I need to look after post upgrade that can impact UPA ?

entry.title: Re: How to create Activity and Return Activitycode after...
entry.content:
Hi nitmanet168,

You can use the following sample code:

 

SAPbobsCOM.ActivitiesService ActivitiesService = (SAPbobsCOM.ActivitiesService)oCompany.GetCompanyService().GetBusinessService(SAPbobsCOM.ServiceTypes.ActivitiesService);
SAPbobsCOM.Activity activity = (SAPbobsCOM.Activity)ActivitiesService.GetDataInterface(SAPbobsCOM.ActivitiesServiceDataInterfaces.asActivity);
SAPbobsCOM.ActivityParams oActParams;
activity.CardCode = "C20000";
activity.Details = "Test DI";
oActParams = ActivitiesService.AddActivity(activity);
var ActCode = oActParams.ActivityCode;

 

Variable ActCode will contain the newly added Activity Code.

Hope it helps!

Kind regards,

ANKIT CHAUHAN

SAP Business One Support

entry.title: Re: CONVT_NO_NUMBER when looping over internal table
entry.content:
Comment from ArthurParisius
 
The shortdump shows the 50005215_5025 as the value that can't be converted. I have however used a different solution since than. I changed my internal table to use the STRUC structure but added some extra fields and used these to get the effect I wanted to achieve.

entry.title: Re: How the ABAP Test Cockpit supports you to adopt ABAP Cloud
entry.content:
Hi Olga,

Thanks for the blog!

Could you please let me know which ATC Variant and how can we execute that for development done directly in BTP ABAP Environment to make sure we are compatible for Clean Core. We have few RAP developments where we have created Behavior implementations in which we are calling some unreleased BAPI's from on-prem system through Cloud destinations but the ATC variant - ABAP_CLOUD_DEVELOPMENT_DEFAULT but its not giving error saying Usage of unreleased BAPI.

Thanks,

Anurag

Cloud

entry.title: c# crystal reports 2015 one report - 10 pages
entry.content:
Hello.

I am using VS2015 with Crystal reports for  VS2015 - CRforVS_13_0_18.exe.

I want creat labels, which currently works fine, but have strange "error",

For every report, create me 10 pages, can resolve problem.

I could say, Yes, print me only first page, but this is for me not resolve, it is bypass.

I was trying with section expert, etc..., but without proper solution.

Does some have any other idea?

Best regards,

Marko

entry.title: Re: ABAP2XLSX change comment size
entry.content:
this is the XML generated in this part:

<?xml version="1.0" encoding="utf-8"?>
<xml xmlns:v="urn:schemas-microsoft-com:vml" xmlns:o="urn:schemas-microsoft-com:office:office" xmlns:x="urn:schemas-microsoft-com:office:excel">
<o:shapelayout v:ext="edit">
<o:idmap v:ext="edit" data="1"/>
</o:shapelayout>
<v:shapetype id="_x0000_t202" coordsize="21600,21600" o:spt="202" path="m,l,21600r21600,l21600,xe">
<v:stroke joinstyle="miter"/>
<v:path gradientshapeok="t" o:connecttype="rect"/>
</v:shapetype>
<v:shape id="_x0000_s1025 " type="#_x0000_t202" style="size:auto;width:auto;height:auto;position:absolute;margin-left:117pt;margin-top:172.5pt;z-index:1;visibility:hidden" fillcolor="#ffffe1" o:insetmode="auto">
<v:fill color2="#ffffe1"/>
<v:shadow on="t" color="black" obscured="t"/>
<v:path o:connecttype="none"/>
<v:textbox style="mso-direction-alt:auto">
<div style="text-align:left"/>
</v:textbox>
<x:ClientData ObjectType="Note">
<x:MoveWithCells/>
<x:SizeWithCells/>
<x:Anchor>2, 15, 11, 10, 4, 31, 15, 9</x:Anchor>
<x:AutoFill>False</x:AutoFill>
<x:Row>9 </x:Row>
<x:Column>2 </x:Column>
</x:ClientData>
</v:shape>
<v:shape id="_x0000_s1026 " type="#_x0000_t202" style="size:auto;width:auto;height:auto;position:absolute;margin-left:117pt;margin-top:172.5pt;z-index:1;visibility:hidden" fillcolor="#ffffe1" o:insetmode="auto">
<v:fill color2="#ffffe1"/>
<v:shadow on="t" color="black" obscured="t"/>
<v:path o:connecttype="none"/>
<v:textbox style="mso-direction-alt:auto">
<div style="text-align:left"/>
</v:textbox>
<x:ClientData ObjectType="Note">
<x:MoveWithCells/>
<x:SizeWithCells/>
<x:Anchor>2, 15, 11, 10, 4, 31, 15, 9</x:Anchor>
<x:AutoFill>False</x:AutoFill>
<x:Row>9 </x:Row>
<x:Column>3 </x:Column>
</x:ClientData>
</v:shape>
</xml>

entry.title: Re: SAP BUSINESS ONE DI API crashes Application
entry.content: My thought is, that (if I am not horribly mistaken) Excel also uses com.
